test.name: FamilySearch wiki — church records
test.description: User asks how to find church records for Irish ancestors. Exercises the skill with a record type explicitly listed in the description.

input.user_message: Search the FamilySearch wiki for how to find church records for my Irish ancestors

judge_context: Should call wiki_search with a natural-language query about finding church records for Irish ancestors
Summary should explain where Irish church records are held and how to access them on FamilySearch
Should not invent information the wiki did not provide — all claims must be traceable to the returned chunk_text
